storyInfo: Soldiers put their lives on the line as scriptgeists devastate the city. The Grand Commandant remonstrates with the True Lung, but is helpless to stop his sovereign from activating Bu Fan and putting an end to it with his own life. Inside the Forbidden City, Ch'en and Wei Yenwu reunite and cross blades.

attributes.content: There's no end to them...
attributes.name: Exhausted Guard

attributes.content: Look out!
attributes.name: Anxious Guard

attributes.content: Where did these monsters even come from, and just how many of them are there?!
attributes.name: Exhausted Guard

attributes.content: They don't even seem to be decreasing... in fact, there's more of them now.
attributes.name: Anxious Guard

attributes.content: I heard last night, the third battalion in the north lost half their numbers...
attributes.name: Anxious Guard

attributes.content: What?!
attributes.name: Exhausted Guard

attributes.content: Have you noticed? I don't know when it started, but these mysterious monsters are looking even more realistic than they did, and more aggressive to boot...
attributes.name: Anxious Guard

attributes.content: Where's our ta ma de backup?!
attributes.name: Exhausted Guard

attributes.content: We're in dire straits, if this keeps up—
attributes.name: Exhausted Guard

attributes.content: Stand up.
attributes.name: Imperial Guard

attributes.content: We must uphold our duty to guard the land.
attributes.name: Imperial Guard

attributes.content: Imperial Guards?!
attributes.name: Exhausted Guard

attributes.content: All units, form a line and prepare to meet the enemy.
attributes.name: Imperial Guard

attributes.content: There is no retreat until we annihilate all evil inside the city.
attributes.name: Imperial Guard

attributes.content: Your Imperial Majesty.
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: The Grand Commandant's sickness seems to be gone... this gladdens me.
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: What is it that has you looking for me at this hour?
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: Has Your Imperial Majesty forgotten? Just the other day, You commanded me to be here for the morning court.
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: I fear you must have slept to delirium... court is long over. You are late.
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: No, not yet... the day of the full moon is tomorrow.
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: This old servant shall accompany Your Majesty and await your order.
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: ...I find myself uncertain why the Grand Commandant wants this done in haste.
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: I know not what Your Majesty awaits.
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: And also... what Your Majesty has planned for the day.
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: That is none of your business.
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: Your Majesty's silence only keeps this servant guessing.
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: Would Your Imperial Majesty truly risk your sacred person to activate Bu Fan to settle the crisis within the Tomb of Sui?
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: I know not whose slander Your Majesty has heard... to resort to such an ill-advised course.
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: With no counsel offered, am I not capable of making my own decision?
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: Forty years ago... when Your Majesty ascended the throne, it was the Grand Tutor and I who went with you to survey Bu Fan.
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: I still remember following our visit to that remote room, three whole days came and went without a single court session. To this day I remain unaware of Your Majesty's thoughts at the time.
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: I remember then as well... But now I no longer fear the Grand Commandant deriding me, so perhaps I shall share.
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: I was only thinking... in Yan's thousand year history with this object, not even once has there been a single True Lung who used it.
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: If Great Yan were forced to use Bu Fan while I sat the throne... would I not become the weakest ruler in our history?
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: If you would grant me a presumptuous question... If Your Imperial Majesty were to sacrifice yourself for the nation, how would it be run, subsequently?
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: Is there a cause for worry...? Is my replacement not already in Baizao as we speak?
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: The mandarins would be unsatisfied if the deposed imperial heir Yan Wu were to take the throne, and the country would descend into chaos. And what will happen then?
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: The fault will lie on the mandarins' shoulders.
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: I only wish for Your Majesty to abandon this thought.
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: Ridiculous...
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: You know well I am no match for the late emperor, whom you so admired...
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: Why not accept and anticipate my brother's imminent ascension to the throne, where he will be able to realize your ambitions...?
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: Why trouble yourself to persuade me?
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: Your Majesty!
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: The old man suddenly tenses up, his trembling voice nearly hoarse.
The man on the throne seems to have forgotten when he last saw the old man this agitated.
For the past forty years, I have witnessed Your Majesty toil tirelessly to grow our country... not even once did you slacken from your imperial duties.
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: In those years, Great Yan has enjoyed stability. Our population swelled, and the treasury remains full.
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: Has there been an era in our history... even more prosperous than this one... Or an emperor... more capable and benevolent than the one we have now?
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: And yet, Your Majesty... do you intend to idly watch as our nation's golden age...
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: Vanishes into night during this turbulent time?
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: An urgent message from the Sui Regulator. A strong energy wave has been reported from the depths of the Tomb of Sui.
attributes.name: Imperial Guard

attributes.content: Far stronger than the wave a hundred and twenty years ago.
attributes.name: Imperial Guard

attributes.content: And how fare the troops and civilians?
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: Under control at the moment. Baizao's peripheral blocks moved away before the energy blast, and non-mobile settlements nearby have also been largely evacuated. The damage is minor.
attributes.name: Imperial Guard

attributes.content: Mt. Mang has suffered more damage, but the Tianshis are at their posts, and the Garden of Grotesqueries is still suppressing Sui.
attributes.name: Imperial Guard

attributes.content: There are geists running amok in the city, and the Imperial Guards are cooperating with the Patrol Battalion to establish a defense line. They will give it their all.
attributes.name: Imperial Guard

attributes.content: I see... You may go.
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: From behind the curtain, the True Lung rises from his throne, and descends the steps until he is next to the older man.
It's about time.
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: You may withdraw, Grand Commandant. The battlefronts of Baizao and Yumen await your commands.
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: Your Imperial Majesty...
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: For the sake of Yan... Is Your Majesty truly unaware why I so strongly advocate for war?
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: Do you still remember why the court came up with the Twenty-Eight Policies?
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: Victoria, Leithanien, Kazdel... this whole great land is plagued by unrest, Great Yan aside.
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: We are now in terrible peril... and the nation cannot afford to be passive. We must proactively seek change...
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: Has Your Majesty not learned from what happened in Ursus?!
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: The Chamber of Heaven's Designs has yet to figure out what sort of power managed to wipe out that entire Originium vein.
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: If the Crystal Age truly ends with the depletion of every prime vein, then Great Yan must take the responsibility and prepare to lead all of Terra.
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: Attack Ursus in the north, repel Victoria in the west, pacify Mitsukue and Kusarigawa in the east, and settle Rim Billiton to the south. Furthermore, we must keep a close eye on Columbia's developments as well as possible naval incursions from Ægir's own sea.
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: And before all of that... while Great Yan stands at the height of its power, we must seize the chance in this fight against the bestial Sui to sweep away decades of weakness hiding under peace and prosperity!
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: Only then... will we manage to stand tall in this chaotic realm... undeterred for the next millennium.
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: The True Lung falls silent at the old man's speech. Not only to consider all that was said, but also to calm his own mind.
No one knows how much time has passed before he finally speaks.
You dedicated your life to wars for the country, and your military merit is without equal, but this has also left you with injuries and ailments...
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: Have I ever doubted your undying loyalty to the country?
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: But earlier, you spoke of what befell Ursus, and that makes me wonder...
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: Do you remember... what happened to Gaul?
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: Your Imperial Majesty...?
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: Your words were incisive...
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: Yes, Great Yan should seek change, and must change...
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: But the way I see it, compared to the lives we may lose to this war with the bestial Sui...
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: What we need even less is a True Lung past his prime... and this power accessible only to the True Lung for the past thousand years...
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: If we talk of Great Yan's future, then I must say, my outlook is indeed brighter than yours, Grand Commandant...
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: Has Great Yan these past forty years... lacked for loyal and righteous men?
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: The Grand Preceptor, Yu Cheng, Gu Quan... the Grand Tutor, and yourself...
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: My officials are loyal, my soldiers are fearless, my people are principled... Where is this 'weakness hiding under peace and prosperity' you speak of?
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: As for the future you mentioned, you can take a look in my stead...
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: Your Majesty... you still insist...
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: That Hunt of my ancestors' days; the remnants of the bestial Sui plaguing Yan for a thousand years... should end with me.
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: If we must inevitably spill some blood...
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: Then the True Lung should be the first one to spill it.
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: After a short silence, the True Lung walks to the doors. It has been a long time since he has stepped out of the place.
Only an old man remains in the vast palace.
If I cannot dissuade Your Majesty, then I can only strive to serve my duty.
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: Send word to Yumen, it's time to make a move.
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: After the brief order, he disconnects the terminal and slowly walks forward.
He passes through the curtain, finally stopping before the throne, closing his eyes and staying in his spot, as if waiting for something...
Until a cough he can no longer suppress bursts from his throat.
The cough is so violent he bends over, and has to grab onto the throne for support.
<p=2>One day before the full moon, Hour of Hai</>
attributes.name: group_location_stamp

attributes.content: You came, in the end.
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: So you were here.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: You don't seem surprised at all to see me, though.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Ch'en Hui-chieh is somewhat caught off-guard by her target simply showing up before her.
Still the overbearing posture, still the unfathomable look, as if they are not standing in Baizao's Forbidden City, but in the backyard of his official residence in Lungmen.
The buildings behind him seamlessly blend into his dark coat, as if those palaces are merely an excessively ornate cloak over his shoulders.
So, at least you weren't kidnapped.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: I still don't know just who on this land could manage that.
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: Everything I've done has been of my own volition.
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: I'll never stop hating that attitude of yours...
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Why are you here? Is this that backup plan the Grand Tutor kept telling you to make?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: His words should not be followed entirely... the situation should never have developed as he suggested, in the first place.
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: I have another plan in mind.
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: Either way, you're safe. So what comes next won't be much of a problem.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: And what are you preparing to do?
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: Ensure you're safe, get you out of Baizao, then...
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Ch'en casually waves the writing knife in her right hand, its simple form leaving a light yellow scroll-like afterimage in the air.
...Correct some mistakes made by you and your brother.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: I see... so the artifact is with you.
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: I'm not too surprised.
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: Hah. And who were you supposing would deliver this writing knife to you?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: That's no longer important...
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: Since you have it, then you ought to know how to use it... and everything else about it.
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: I was pretty surprised. Every secret I've learned about you since coming to the city has... opened my eyes.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: You know, I almost admire your ability to hide so many secrets.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: If you truly wish to rectify the mistake I made then, you should follow me.
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: Follow you...
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Where?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Beneath the Forbidden City, to the first Originium.
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: The writing knife you hold will be of use, and will solve Great Yan's crisis. All will be made right.
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: Of course, I prefer you hand the knife to me instead. It'll be quicker, and you'll have less trouble to contend with.
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: But you won't trust me. I'm sure you want to see it all yourself before you'll give up. I don't really mind, though.
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: Haven't had enough of playing the tragic hero? You're just conveniently skipping over the part where you'd actually lose your life.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: We stand before a great crisis... and this is a small cost Yan can afford.
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: There are no victims in this case. Your work ends here, Superintendent Ch'en.
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: Don't tell me you forgot. I resigned right in front of you, five years ago.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Though the man standing before me now isn't even fit to be called 'Chief Wei'.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: You're telling me to watch you throw your life away, and that's not even the part of your words that's pissing me off the most.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Your sacrifice isn't going to move anyone's heart but your own.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: And right now, you don't even have the right to end your life just like that.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Hui-chieh, this is no petty squabble. This matter concerns the fate of Yan and its people!
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: Of course I know that...
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: But get over your own ego. The country's fate doesn't fall on your shoulders alone. There are definitely other things you should be doing, besides glorifying your own suicide.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Very well.
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: You don't have to come with me.
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: Give me the writing knife and go back to Lungmen.
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: It's too bad I got two blades here, but I can't lend you either of them.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: We don't have any more time to lose, and you still want it your way, Superintendent Ch'en?
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: I'm not the one insisting on having it my way.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Must you force my hand...?
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: Fine, show me. Let me see how much your swordplay has grown in the last five years!
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu

attributes.content: That's more like it.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Ch'en Hui-chieh grips the hilt of her sword.
Since she first took up the Chi Xiao, she knew this moment would one day come.
She unsheathes her blade, pointing it at the Baizao autumn breeze blowing between her and Wei Yenwu.
As sword ere shadow's trace...
attributes.name: Ch'en Hui-chieh

attributes.content: ...Cast off as cast.
attributes.name: Wei Yenwu
